subject: A dark-furred greyhound or lurcher-type dog wearing ornate silver-and-gold plate armor stands in a rainy meadow at dusk, gazing upward; beside it, a golden-hilted sword is planted point-down in the grass; fireflies drift in the background
description: A slender dark-furred hound — resembling a greyhound or Irish wolfhound — stands upright in a lush meadow under a stormy evening sky. The dog wears fitted plate armor in silver with gold scrollwork filigree, covering the chest, back, and haunches in well-fitted panels with small clasps. Its head is raised, looking upward, floppy ears back, with an attentive and loyal expression. Beside the dog on its left, a sword with an elaborate golden claw-hilt is planted vertically in the grass, blade down. The meadow grass is green and low, dotted with tiny wildflowers. The sky above is heavy storm clouds with rain streaks beginning to fall. In the background, the soft glow of multiple fireflies or sparkling lights floats among dark trees, creating a quiet, melancholy atmosphere. The palette is cool blue-grey with gold accents and a streak of pale golden-green light at the horizon.
foreground: Armored greyhound-type dog standing in meadow grass; golden-hilted sword planted in earth beside it
background: Stormy dusk sky with rain, dark trees, floating firefly lights
emotion: loyal, watchful, steadfast; the upward gaze suggests alertness or mourning; melancholy and calm coexist
